en.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
en.description: Tracks the top over-ear noise cancelling headphones for commuters, travelers, and work-from-home users.

zh-tw.title: 最佳降噪耳罩式耳機 2026
zh-tw.description: 追蹤通勤者、旅行者和居家工作者的頂級耳罩式降噪耳機排行榜。

en.description: Sony's flagship ANC headphones with the QN3 chip, offering class-leading noise cancellation, LDAC support, and a redesigned foldable frame.
Bose's premium flagship with ActiveSense ANC that dynamically adjusts to surroundings and Immersive Audio spatial sound mode.
Audiophile-grade sound with adaptive ANC and an industry-leading 60-hour battery life at a mid-range price.
Apple's premium over-ear headphones with H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, lossless audio via USB-C, and deep Apple ecosystem integration.
Budget ANC headphones with rare LDAC support and 50-hour battery that punch far above their price point.
Sony's lightest ANC headphone at 192g, offering solid noise cancellation and 35-hour battery for budget-conscious buyers.
Luxury over-ear headphones with Carbon Cone drivers and Nappa leather construction, targeting audiophiles who demand premium materials.
A beloved Bose classic with TriPort acoustic architecture and exceptional comfort, now available at a discounted legacy price.
Enterprise-focused headset with a 10-microphone array, best-in-class call quality, and 37-hour battery for all-day meetings.
Teams-certified headset with a 13-level ANC dial and dedicated Teams button, built for Microsoft 365 enterprise workflows.

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 is the best noise-cancelling headphone I've tested in 2026, and the margin of victory is larger than the scores suggest. The QN3 chip — seven times faster than its predecessor — processes ANC feedback so rapidly that the noise floor feels like it drops immediately, not gradually. Sony's claim of class-leading noise cancellation is validated by RTINGS, Wirecutter, Tom's Guide, and every independent lab that has tested it. LDAC support means you're not sacrificing audio quality for wireless convenience. The redesigned foldable frame is more compact than the XM5 and feels noticeably more premium. At a street price of $319–$399, it's the most complete headphone you can buy regardless of price. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra at #2 is the only headphone that meaningfully threatens the XM6's ANC performance. Bose's ActiveSense technology — which dynamically adjusts noise cancellation based on the acoustic environment — handles sudden noise spikes better than any competing technology. Some reviewers give the QCU a narrow ANC edge for unpredictable environments like airports. I respect that assessment while maintaining the XM6's #1 position because Sony's combination of ANC + LDAC + battery + price creates a more complete package. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 deserves special recognition for a single achievement: 60 hours of ANC battery life. That's not a typo. No other headphone in this category comes close. If you travel frequently and hate charging, the Momentum 4 is the only headphone that will survive a long-haul flight, a layover, and a full working day on a single charge. The Bowers & Wilkins Px8 has the highest sound quality score in this entire ranking — 9.5 — and still ranks #7. That tells you everything about the trade-off: at $699 with average ANC, it's the headphone for audiophiles who prioritize how music sounds over how much noise it blocks.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Is the Best ANC Headphone Ever Made — the QN3 Chip Changes Everything
highlights.body: The QN3 chip's 7x processing speed improvement over the previous generation means ANC feedback loops are processed before your brain perceives the noise. In practice, this translates to a noise floor that feels absolute — not just reduced, but eliminated. Combined with LDAC for hi-res audio wirelessly and a redesigned frame that's genuinely more comfortable than the XM5, the WH-1000XM6 earns its #1 position not by being slightly better than the competition, but by being measurably ahead in every category that matters.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Is the Right Choice If You're in Loud, Unpredictable Environments
highlights.body: ActiveSense's real-time dynamic adjustment of noise cancellation is Bose's ace card. In environments with sudden noise spikes — an airport gate, a construction site, a busy open-plan office — the QCU adapts faster than any competing ANC algorithm. Some independent reviewers give it a narrow edge over the XM6 for these scenarios specifically. If your primary environment is chaotic rather than consistently loud, the QCU's dynamic approach may serve you better than Sony's more static optimization.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4's 60-Hour Battery Is the Most Underappreciated Feature in This Category
highlights.body: Every other headphone at this price tier offers 20–30 hours of ANC battery. Sennheiser delivers 60. That's not an incremental improvement — it means you can use the Momentum 4 for an entire long-haul flight, a multi-day conference, or a full workweek without reaching for a cable. The ANC quality (8.2) is competent rather than class-leading, but for frequent travelers who prioritize never running out of power, no other headphone at under $350 makes a stronger argument.

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Max at #4 Is the Best Option for Apple Users Who Refuse to Compromise on Sound
highlights.body: The AirPods Max's H2 chip delivers the best sound quality score among the top 4 headphones at 9.3. Adaptive Audio, lossless audio via USB-C, and the deep Apple ecosystem integration create a listening experience that no Android-compatible headphone can replicate for iPhone users. The 20-hour battery and $549 price are real limitations, but if you're in the Apple ecosystem and sound quality is your priority, the AirPods Max is the correct choice and the cost is justified.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 at $100 Is the Most Embarrassingly Good Value in This Entire Category
highlights.body: LDAC support — a feature that should be gatekept to $300+ headphones — combined with adaptive ANC, 50-hour battery, and a foldable design for $100 is the most aggressively priced value proposition I've seen in consumer audio. The sound quality (7.5) and comfort (7.5) don't match the premium options, but for a secondary headphone, a student purchase, or anyone with a strict budget, the Space Q45 makes every $200 headphone look like a bad deal. RTINGS confirms it as their top budget ANC pick, and I agree without reservation.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 是我在 2026 年測試過的最好的降噪耳機，勝出的差距比評分所顯示的還要大。QN3 晶片——比其前身快七倍——處理 ANC 反饋的速度如此之快，以至於噪音底板感覺是立即降低的，而不是漸進的。Sony 的行業頂尖降噪聲稱已由 RTINGS、Wirecutter、Tom's Guide 和每個獨立實驗室驗證。LDAC 支援意味著你不必為了無線便利犧牲音質。重新設計的可折疊框架比 XM5 更緊湊，感覺更高端。以 $319-$399 的街頭售價，它是你無論價格如何都能購買的最完整耳機。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排名第 2 是唯一有意義威脅 XM6 降噪性能的耳機。Sennheiser Momentum 4 排名第 3 因單一成就值得特別認可：60 小時的 ANC 電池壽命。這不是打字錯誤。這個類別中沒有任何其他耳機接近這個數字。Soundcore Space Q45 以 $100 提供 LDAC 和自適應 ANC，是整個品類最令人汗顏的性價比。Bowers & Wilkins Px8 擁有整個排名中最高的音質評分——9.5——卻仍然排名第 7。這告訴你一切關於取捨的信息：$699 加上一般的 ANC，它是優先考慮音樂聽起來如何而不是阻擋多少噪音的音響玩家的耳機。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是有史以來最好的 ANC 耳機——QN3 晶片改變了一切
highlights.body: QN3 晶片比上一代 7 倍的處理速度意味著 ANC 反饋循環在你的大腦感知噪音之前就已被處理。在實踐中，這轉化為一個感覺絕對的噪音底板——不只是減少，而是消除。結合無線 LDAC 高解析音訊和真正比 XM5 更舒適的重新設計框架，WH-1000XM6 贏得其第 1 名的地位，不是通過比競爭對手略好，而是在每個重要類別中可測量地領先。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 是你處於嘈雜、不可預測環境的正確選擇
highlights.body: ActiveSense 對降噪的實時動態調整是 Bose 的王牌。在有突發噪音峰值的環境中——機場登機口、建築工地、繁忙的開放式辦公室——QCU 的適應速度比任何競爭的 ANC 算法都快。一些獨立評測者在這些特定場景中給它比 XM6 略微的優勢。如果你的主要環境是混亂的而不是持續嘈雜的，QCU 的動態方法可能比 Sony 更靜態的優化更好地服務你。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電池是這個品類中最被低估的功能
highlights.body: 這個價位的每款其他耳機提供 20-30 小時的 ANC 電池。Sennheiser 提供 60 小時。這不是漸進性改進——這意味著你可以在整個長途飛行、多天會議或整整一週工作中使用 Momentum 4 而無需拿起充電線。ANC 品質（8.2）稱職而非行業領先，但對於優先考慮永不耗電的頻繁旅行者，在 $350 以下沒有其他耳機提出更有力的論據。

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Max 排名第 4，是拒絕在音質上妥協的 Apple 用戶最佳選擇
highlights.body: AirPods Max 的 H2 晶片以 9.3 的評分提供前四款耳機中最高的音質評分。Adaptive Audio、USB-C 無損音訊，以及深度 Apple 生態系整合為 iPhone 用戶創造了 Android 兼容耳機無法複製的聆聽體驗。20 小時電池和 $549 售價是真實的限制，但如果你在 Apple 生態系中且音質是你的優先考慮，AirPods Max 是正確的選擇，費用是合理的。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 以 $100 是整個品類最令人汗顏的性價比
highlights.body: LDAC 支援——一個應該被把關在 $300 以上耳機的功能——結合自適應 ANC、50 小時電池和可折疊設計，以 $100 是我在消費者音訊中見過的最激進的定價主張。音質（7.5）和舒適度（7.5）不能與高端選項媲美，但對於備用耳機、學生購買或任何預算嚴格的人，Space Q45 讓每款 $200 的耳機看起來都像是壞買賣。RTINGS 確認它為其頂級預算 ANC 選擇，我毫不保留地同意。
